3D website!!

BOXES

boxes r like 3d objects with 6 faces, which are quadrilaterals. here, just drag an drop an img file and the texture of the box will change.

TORUSES

torus is a 3d shape that looks like a donut. it has a circular crosssection and a hole in the middle. again,, just drag an drop an img file and the texture of the torus will change.
